heading: Annotated United States Code for Members of House of Representatives to be paid for from Members’ Representational Allowance
label: 5345 Annotated United States Code for Members of House of Representatives to be paid for from Members’ Representational Allowance
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 54 of this titleSection is comprised of . Subsec. (d) of repealed former .section 107 of Pub. L. 104–186section 107 of Pub. L. 104–186section 54 of this title

Change of NameCommittee on House Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on House Administration of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Clerk of the House of Representatives shall, at the request of a Member of the House of Representatives, furnish to the Member, for official use only, one set of a privately published annotated version of the United States Code, including supplements and pocket parts. The furnishing of a set of the United States Code under this section shall be in lieu of any distribution under and shall be paid for from the Members’ Representational Allowance.section 212 of title 1

children.heading: “Member of the House of Representatives” defined
children.label: b “Member of the House of Representatives” defined
children.text: As used in this section, the term “Member of the House of Representatives” means a Representative in, or a Delegate or Resident Commissioner to, the Congress.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Committee on House Oversight of the House of Representatives shall have authority to prescribe regulations to carry out this section.
